title: Game What Eva games have you played
display_title: Game What Eva games have you played
wikitext:
[]: [Game] What Eva games have you played?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Apr 22, 2009 10:57 pm I'm not sure if this was done before since I look it up and found nothing? So which Eva games have you played so far? For me I played: Eva64 Ikari Shinji Raising Project Girl Friend of Steel 1 and 2 That about it for now. I hope to play Evangelion 2, Battle Orchestra, and Detective Eva soon.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Wed Apr 22, 2009 11:53 pm lol, that joke-dating RPG on Newgrounds. My very first experience with EVA, and I had no idea wtf was going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 23, 2009 1:02 am Captain_Morgan wrote: lol, that joke-dating RPG on Newgrounds.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Apr 23, 2009 9:55 am The first Girlfriend of Steel game.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Apr 23, 2009 10:01 am GOS, Eva64, some weird RTSish game around 1999.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 23, 2009 12:47 pm There's a similar topic of what's your FAVORITE Eva game here . In terms of what I played (or beaten): GoS1 fansub, GoS2, Eva N64 (only got past Sachiel after that Shinji kept dying), Evangelion 2 for PS2, Evangelion 2 Another Cases for PSP, Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Completion Project (PS2). Also, a few fangames here and there: That Eva4 dating parody sim and that H quiz game, among a few other H games like the Pinball Map games and Toy Asuka. (I don't like those that much, but the Pinball Map ones are teh cute. ) I'm currently playing: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (at least when I've found the time) as well as re-playing Eva2 whenever I feel like it. Also, I'll be playing the GoS Special Edition PSP port once I get it in the mail. =3 I want to play that Rebuild game once it comes out, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Apr 23, 2009 1:15 pm This :

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Apr 23, 2009 1:41 pm I've bought and played GoS2 and Evangelion 2 for the PSP and a few other games.... But if I want to play one I'll DL the ISO. Which is very helpful now that my PSP drive is broken.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Fri Apr 24, 2009 12:02 pm I've played: Evangelion 2: Another Cases (PSP) Secret of Evangelion (PSP) Puchi Eva (NDS) Now I'm playing 'Girlfriend of Steel' in my PSP. I also remember a weird, free Tactic RPG, probably fan-made, for PC. It was simple but I enjoyed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 24, 2009 12:29 pm I've played Girlfriend of Steel(fansub) and Evangelion 64(rom). Eva 64 is irritating to play with these damn keyboard controls.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 25, 2009 2:19 pm I played and beat GoS Special Edition (PSP port) after getting it in the mail the other day. ^^; The 4th new ending from the PS2 port seems...odd but I'll discuss that in the appropriate thread.

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Fri May 01, 2009 9:13 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: I've played Girlfriend of Steel(fansub) and Evangelion 64(rom). Eva 64 is irritating to play with these damn keyboard controls.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue May 12, 2009 3:36 pm I've only tried Evangelion 64...and the only thing that manages to do is piss me off...

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue May 12, 2009 3:51 pm I've only played Evangelion 64 and Girlfriend of Steel (if you can even call the latter a game). Sadly, I've yet to be impressed by an Evangelion-inspired video game. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Nihbiels » Tue May 12, 2009 6:01 pm I've played Evangelion 2nd Impression, Girlfriend of Steel 1, and Digital Card Library, all for the glorious Sega Saturn!

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue May 12, 2009 6:09 pm Nihbiels wrote: ...all for the glorious Sega Saturn!

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu May 14, 2009 5:07 pm Anyone here played Evangelion Mugen? Either it's hard or I just really really suck because I can't get passed Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu May 14, 2009 6:29 pm pikadourei wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: I've played Girlfriend of Steel(fansub) and Evangelion 64(rom). Eva 64 is irritating to play with these damn keyboard controls.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri May 15, 2009 10:03 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: That reminds me. I gave up on the Jet Alone level. I only want to beat he game to check out the extras. [sadface]

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 15, 2009 12:19 pm I played eva 64 on an emulator = sucked balls
